renames.rationale: Called from abort/raise, tail-calls common_exit; classic MSVC abort terminator thunk.
3-insn thunk into common_exit; CRT exit wrapper sibling of abort_via_common_exit.
Called from _onexit, tail-calls _register_onexit_function; standard CRT onexit shim.
Single callee _initialize_onexit_table; CRT onexit table init wrapper.
Caller __scrt_initialize_crt, callee __acrt_execute_initializers; CRT init-table executor wrapper.
